context: Personal reimbursement policy for Andrew Morales's music work: session gear, studio expenses, and co-write travel routed through the sole-proprietor QuickBooks file.

validation_rules.action: Attach original receipt or vendor invoice PDF to the QuickBooks expense before submission.
validation_rules.notes: Applies to studio time, gear purchases, mastering, vinyl pressing, and industry travel. Andrew reviews above $200 before commitment.
validation_rules.requirement: Receipt required for any music-related expense over $25.
